title: Our Sailing Team won the championship award in the races

Our Sailing Team won the championship award in the races

Doğuş University Sailing Team competing in Collegiate Sailing Championship, Marmaris International Yacht Club-Campus Cup, Urla Yatch Club – Universail and Jimmy Key Cup, İstanbul Sailing Club Trophy and BAU Trophy added another achievement to its former ones.

Congratulations to our team, the winner of the Campus Cup and Universail and Jimmy Key Overall races.
